Simple Process

How to Order

1

Choose Product

Click "Buy Now" on any product you like. Fill in your address and payment details.

2

Complete Payment

Pay securely via Razorpay — choose UPI, Card, Netbanking or Wallet. Payment is processed instantly and securely.

3

Confirm on WhatsApp

Send your payment screenshot on WhatsApp. Orders are confirmed only after payment is received & verified.

Important Information

Our Policies

Policy

  • Orders confirmed only after payment is received
  • Secure online payment via Razorpay — No COD
  • Record full unboxing video with timestamp — mandatory in case of any damages
  • Damage claims without an unboxing video will not be accepted
  • Video mandatory for damage claims with timestamp
  • DM or WhatsApp for any queries

Address Details

  • Pan India shipping available
  • South India — ₹60 shipping
  • North India — ₹100 shipping
  • Free shipping above ₹999
  • Dispatch within 1 day of payment
  • Delivery in 3–5 business days

Payment

  • Pay securely via Razorpay
  • UPI, Cards, Netbanking & Wallets accepted
  • No Cash on Delivery (COD)
  • Payment confirmation sent automatically
  • 100% secure — your payment details are never shared with us
